name: Elisium 400
comment:
Light Source
Lamp: Multichip 400W Led
Color Temperature: 7800K±200K
Source life expectancy: 30,000 hours
Optics
Lens Diameter: 138mm
Beam: 3.5°~ 6°
Spot: 5°~ 35°
Wash: 17°~ 45°
Focus: Motorized Focus & Motorized Zoom
Color System
Colour mixing: CMY colour system on 9 Color
Colour wheel: 3 CTO Color + 6 RGB Color on 3 independent colour wheels
Body
Material: High temperature and anti-UV ABS and aluminum
Body Color: Black
Transport: Two side handles
Device Locking PAN and TILT: Yes
Head Movement
Pan: 540º
Tilt: 270º
Pan/Tilt Resolution: 8 Bit / 16 Bit
Packing
Professional 90 Degree Clamp: Optional
Power Cable: Powercon with Cable
Signal: Male / Female Connector ‘’3 pin or 5 Pin’’
Control
Protocols: DMX512 ‘’Built-in Program, DMX, Master Slave’’
Short Mode: 22 Channels
Standard Mode: 26 Channels
Display: LCD Display
Dimmer / Strobe
Dimmer: 0-100% Electronic Dimmer
Strobe: Variable speeds (15 F.P.S at maximum)
Dynamic Effects
Fixed Gobo: 10 fixed gobos + open & 7 Rotating Gobo + Open
Effect: High speed shake effect
Strobe Effect: Mechanical shutter and adjustable speed strobe effect
Frost: Motorized
Dimmer: Mechanical dimmer
Prism
Prism 1: 3-face Rotating prism
Physical
IP Rating: IP 20
Net Weight: 24kg
Dimension: 393mm x 260mm x 668mm
Cooling: Forced Air With Fan
Clamp: Omega Brackets 90 Degree Professional Clamp ‘’Optional’’
Connectors: PowerCon + Signal: 3 pin or 5 Pin
Electrical
Main Power Supply: 100V-240V 50/60Hz
Input Power: 450W@230V
Power Factor: PF > 0.90

capabilities.comment: Strobe Pulse S > F - Strobe Pulse Random
Strobe Random S > F - Strobe Random
Iris Pulse Opening S > F - Iris Open
Iris Pulse Closing S > F - Iris Closed
